chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-180 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.1173/2023. For orders on MA No.1174/2023. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Muzaffar Laghari advocate holding brief for Mr.Ghulam Shabbir Mari advocate for petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
